body:
---
**THE LEAK:**
Missed calls burn $167/hr. 44% booking rate × $380 avg ticket × 10 calls/hr = $1,672 lost daily. NUMBER NEEDED — estimate: $500k/yr.

**PROOF OF LIFE:**
Firestone’s AI intake pilot cut no-shows 31%. Same tech, same vertical. They’re eating your lunch.

**THE FIX:**
AI answers 24/7, books instantly, upsells diagnostics ($120), texts confirmations. No voicemail. No wait. No human error.

**THE CATCH:**
Staff will resist. “We’ve always done it this way.” Training drags. ROI stalls if team sabotages.

**THE REVERSAL:**
Top district performers thrive on data. AI gives real-time leaderboards. Winners get bonuses. Losers get exposed. Culture eats resistance.

**THE ASK:**
Schedule 15-minute demo. Show me your call logs. I’ll prove the bleed.

**THE HOOK:**
Your phone is costing you $500k/year
---
target: Casey's General Store Wellington KS managers could benefit from automation and sales to stock pos integration. Kitchen could donate hot food and cold food shortly before expiration times to homeless and unemployed locals for tax write-off. Need to promote from within, mid twenties KM/early thirties GM. Aggresively seeking to foster healthy competitive environment perfect for competition to be top district performers.
